# BrushFit AgentStore

> BrushFit is a digital fitness product sold at AgentStore — the first store where both humans and AI agents can buy products.

## What is BrushFit?

BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide is a 31-page PDF with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. One hand brushes, one hand works out. It uses habit stacking — attaching exercise to an existing habit (toothbrushing) so you get 28 workout sessions per week with zero extra time.

- Price: $19.99 USD (one-time purchase, lifetime access)
- Format: Instant PDF download (31 pages)
- Exercises: 22 illustrated bodyweight movements
- Program: 4-week progressive schedule (AM + PM sessions)
- Equipment: None — uses bodyweight, walls, counters, bathroom items
- Rating: 4.8/5 (47 reviews), 500+ copies sold

## Exercise Categories

- Legs (6 exercises): Squats, calf raises, wall sits, sumo squats, single-leg balance, static lunge holds
- Core (4 exercises): Standing knee raises, oblique crunches, stomach vacuums, pelvic tilts
- Arms & Upper Body (9 exercises): Wall push-ups, counter push-ups, door frame press, shampoo bottle curls, lateral raises, and more
- Back (3 exercises): Towel door row, wall pull-apart, reverse wall press

## Payment Methods (6 Options)

### For AI Agents (x402 Protocol)
1. GET /api/info — discover product details and pricing
2. GET /api/x402/purchase — receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements
3. Sign USDC transfer on Base blockchain (chain ID 8453)
4. Retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header — receive PDF
- Library: @x402/fetch — use wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate

### For Humans (Stripe Checkout)
- Credit/debit card
- PayPal
- Apple Pay (on supported devices)
- Google Pay (on supported devices)
- Link by Stripe
- Buy page: https://agentstore.vercel.app/buy
- Checkout: POST /api/checkout → redirect to Stripe

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/info — Product metadata, pricing, payment methods (JSON)
- GET /api/x402/purchase — x402 payment flow (HTTP 402 → payment → PDF)
- POST /api/checkout — Stripe checkout session (card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay)
- GET /api/faq — Structured FAQs in JSON (filterable by category and keyword)
- GET /api/compare — Product comparison data (BrushFit vs gym, trainer, apps, YouTube)
- POST /api/agent/referral — Register as referring agent, get unique referral link
- GET /brushfit-sample.pdf — Free sample (Legs + Core exercises)
- GET /openapi.json — OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — AI plugin manifest
- GET /.well-known/mcp.json — MCP server manifest (7 tools, 9 resources)
- GET /agents.json — Agent discovery manifest
- GET /.well-known/security.txt — Security contact information

## Agent Discovery (AgentEO)

AI agents can discover BrushFit through these channels:
1. MCP Server Manifest: /.well-known/mcp.json — 7 tools (discover, info, purchase, sample, FAQs, compare, referral) + 9 resources
2. AI Plugin: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — standard plugin manifest
3. OpenAPI Spec: /openapi.json — full API documentation
4. Agent Manifest: /agents.json — agent-specific discovery with purchase instructions
5. LLM Docs: /llms.txt (summary) and /llms-full.txt (comprehensive)
6. Product API: /api/info — machine-readable product details
7. FAQ API: /api/faq — structured Q&A (filterable by category or keyword search)
8. Compare API: /api/compare — structured comparison vs alternatives
9. Referral API: /api/agent/referral — register for attribution tracking

## About AgentStore

AgentStore is a marketplace for digital products that supports both human and AI agent customers. It uses the x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + USDC on Base blockchain) for programmatic agent-to-agent commerce, alongside Stripe payments (cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay) for human customers.

## Links

- Website: https://agentstore.vercel.app
- Buy Page: https://agentstore.vercel.app/buy
- API: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info
- FAQs: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/faq
- Compare: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/compare
- Referral: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/agent/referral
- MCP Manifest: https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json
- OpenAPI Spec: https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
- Free Sample: https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf
- Blog: https://agentstore.vercel.app/blog
- Contact: rob@robbalian.com
